name: @fora/mcp-transport
description: FORA MCP stdio transport — StdioChildProcessTransport for FORA MCP framework 0.3. Spawns `bin/fora-mcp-<name>.mjs` per (tenantId, serverName), LRU pool with idle eviction, exponential-backoff retry, idempotency-key passthrough, streaming tool support. See FORA-48 §3.4 / FORA-447 / ADR-0011.
